sentences.sentence: Excavations at the site of prehistoric Akrotiri, on the coast of the Aegean Sea, have revealed much about the technical aspects of pottery manufacture, indisputably one of the basic industries of this Greek city.
sentences.translation: 对爱琴海沿岸史前阿克罗蒂里遗址的发掘，揭示了许多陶器制造技术方面的信息；制陶无疑是这座希腊城市的基础产业之一。

structure.text: Excavations at the site of prehistoric Akrotiri
on the coast of the Aegean Sea
much about the technical aspects of pottery manufacture
indisputably one of the basic industries of this Greek city

difficult_points: on the coast... 插入修饰 prehistoric Akrotiri，说明遗址位置。
句末同位补充语语义上说明 pottery manufacture，而非 excavations；indisputably 表示作者确信其基础产业地位。

sentences.sentence: However, considerably less is known about the socio-economic context and the way production was organised.
sentences.translation: 然而，人们对其社会经济背景以及生产组织方式的了解要少得多。

structure.text: about the socio-economic context and the way production was organised

difficult_points: considerably less 是名词化的比较表达，指“少得多的信息”，作被动句主语。
the way 后省略关系词 in which，production was organised 说明生产组织的方式。

sentences.sentence: The bulk of pottery found at Akrotiri is locally made, and dates from the late fifteenth century BC.
sentences.translation: 阿克罗蒂里发现的大部分陶器都在当地制造，其年代可追溯至公元前15世纪晚期。

structure.text: and dates from the late fifteenth century BC

difficult_points: found at Akrotiri 是过去分词短语，修饰 pottery。
is made 与 dates from 是共用主语 The bulk 的并列谓语；date from 表示年代可追溯至。

sentences.sentence: It clearly fulfilled a vast range of the settlement's requirements: more than fifty different types of pots can be distinguished.
sentences.translation: 这些陶器显然满足了聚落极为广泛的需求：可以区分出的陶器类型超过50种。

structure.text: a vast range of the settlement's requirements
more than fifty different types of pots can be distinguished

difficult_points: It 回指阿克罗蒂里当地生产的 pottery，按集合概念理解。
冒号后的分句用种类数量具体证明需求范围广；can be distinguished 是情态动词加被动语态。

expressions.text: fulfil a vast range of requirements

sentences.sentence: The pottery found includes a wide variety of functional types like storage jars, smaller containers, pouring vessels, cooking pots, drinking vessels and so on, which all relate to specific activities and which would have been made and distributed with those activities in mind.
sentences.translation: 出土陶器包括多种功能类型，如储藏罐、小型容器、倾倒用器皿、炊具、饮用器皿等；这些器物都对应特定活动，而且其制造和分配也会把这些活动的需要考虑在内。

structure.text: a wide variety of functional types like storage jars, smaller containers, pouring vessels, cooking pots, drinking vessels and so on
which all relate to specific activities
and which would have been made and distributed with those activities in mind

difficult_points: found 后置修饰 pottery；like 后列举功能类型。
两个 which 从句并列修饰 functional types，第二个使用 would have been made and distributed 推测过去的制造和分配。
with those activities in mind 表示设计生产时考虑了对应活动的需求。

sentences.sentence: Given the large number of shapes produced and the relatively high degree of standardisation, it has generally been assumed that most, if not all, of Akrotiri pottery was produced by specialised craftsmen in a nondomestic context.
sentences.translation: 鉴于生产出的器形数量众多且标准化程度较高，人们通常认为，阿克罗蒂里的陶器即使不是全部，至少大部分由专业工匠在家庭之外的生产环境中制作。

structure.text: Given the large number of shapes produced and the relatively high degree of standardisation
that most, if not all, of Akrotiri pottery was produced by specialised craftsmen in a nondomestic context

difficult_points: Given 在此是介词，表示“鉴于”；produced 修饰 shapes。
it 是形式主语，that 从句为真正主语，has been assumed 是现在完成时被动。
most, if not all 表示保守判断“即使不是全部，至少大部分”。

sentences.sentence: Unfortunately neither the potters' workshops nor kilns have been found within the excavated area.
sentences.translation: 遗憾的是，在已发掘区域内既未发现陶工的作坊，也未发现窑炉。

structure.text: neither the potters' workshops nor kilns

difficult_points: neither... nor... 连接两个并列主语，表示两者均未发现。
have been found 是现在完成时被动，说明截至目前的发掘结果；excavated 是过去分词修饰 area。

sentences.sentence: The reason may be that the ceramic workshops were located on the periphery of the site, which has not yet been excavated.
sentences.translation: 原因可能是陶器作坊位于遗址边缘，而该区域尚未发掘。

structure.text: that the ceramic workshops were located on the periphery of the site
which has not yet been excavated

difficult_points: that 从句作表语，说明可能的原因；may 表示推测。
which 最自然地指 the periphery of the site，即尚未发掘的遗址边缘区域。

expressions.text: be located on the periphery of

sentences.sentence: In any event, the ubiquity of the pottery, and the consistent repetition of the same types in different sizes, suggests production on an industrial scale.
sentences.translation: 无论如何，陶器分布极广，而且相同器型以不同尺寸反复出现，这表明当时的生产已达到工业规模。

structure.text: the ubiquity of the pottery, and the consistent repetition of the same types in different sizes

difficult_points: In any event 表示无论作坊为何尚未发现，现有陶器证据仍支持结论。
句首语义上包含两项证据，但源文谓语使用单数 suggests，将整体证据视作一个组合。
on an industrial scale 表示产量和组织达到规模化水平。

sentences.sentence: The Akrotirian potters seem to have responded to pressures beyond their households, namely to the increasing complexity of regional distribution and exchange systems.
sentences.translation: 阿克罗蒂里的陶工似乎是在回应家庭范围之外的压力，也就是区域分配与交换体系日益复杂所带来的压力。

structure.text: namely to the increasing complexity of regional distribution and exchange systems

difficult_points: seem to have responded 使用完成式不定式，表示根据证据对过去反应作推断。
namely 后的 to 短语同位解释 pressures 的具体来源。

sentences.sentence: We can imagine them as full time craftsmen working permanently in a high production-rate craft such as pottery manufacture, and supporting themselves entirely from the proceeds of their craft.
sentences.translation: 我们可以设想，他们是全职工匠，长期从事制陶这类高产量手工业，并完全依靠手艺收入维生。

structure.text: working permanently in a high production-rate craft such as pottery manufacture
and supporting themselves entirely from the proceeds of their craft

difficult_points: imagine A as B 表示把陶工设想为全职专业人员；them 指 Akrotirian potters。
working 和 supporting 是并列现在分词，修饰 craftsmen。
the proceeds of their craft 指制陶手艺带来的收入，而不是生产过程。

sentences.sentence: In view of the above, one can begin to speak in terms of mass-produced pottery and the existence of organised workshops of craftsmen during the period 1550-1500 BC.
sentences.translation: 鉴于上述情况，我们可以开始从批量生产陶器和有组织工匠作坊的角度，讨论公元前1550年至1500年这一时期。

structure.text: in terms of mass-produced pottery and the existence of organised workshops of craftsmen

difficult_points: one 是泛指主语，相当于 researchers or we，并非数字“一”。
in terms of 表示采用某种概念框架来描述证据。
mass-produced 和 organised 都是过去分词形容词，分别修饰 pottery 和 workshops。

sentences.sentence: Yet, how pottery production was organised at Akrotiri remains an open question, as there is no real documentary evidence.
sentences.translation: 然而，由于缺乏真正的文献证据，阿克罗蒂里的陶器生产究竟如何组织，仍是一个悬而未决的问题。

structure.text: how pottery production was organised at Akrotiri
as there is no real documentary evidence

difficult_points: how 从句整体作主语，使用陈述语序 pottery production was organised。
as 引导原因从句；there is 是存在结构，说明缺少文献证据。

sentences.sentence: Our entire knowledge comes from the ceramic material itself, and the tentative conclusions which can be drawn from it.
sentences.translation: 我们的全部认识都来自陶器材料本身，以及从这些材料中可以谨慎推导出的暂时性结论。

structure.text: the ceramic material itself, and the tentative conclusions
which can be drawn from it

difficult_points: comes from 后并列 ceramic material 与 tentative conclusions 两个来源。
which 修饰 conclusions；can be drawn from 表示结论可从材料推导，it 指 ceramic material。

sentences.sentence: The invention of units of quantity and of a numerical system to count them was of capital importance for an exchange-geared society such as that of Akrotiri.
sentences.translation: 对阿克罗蒂里这样以交换为导向的社会而言，发明数量单位及用于计数这些单位的数字体系至关重要。

structure.text: The invention of units of quantity and of a numerical system to count them
for an exchange-geared society such as that of Akrotiri

difficult_points: of units... and of a numerical system... 是 invention 后的两个并列内容。
them 指 units of quantity；to count... 修饰 numerical system。
that 代替 an exchange-geared society，that of Akrotiri 表示阿克罗蒂里的社会。

sentences.sentence: In spite of the absence of any written records, the archaeological evidence reveals that concepts of measurements, both of weight and number, had been formulated.
sentences.translation: 尽管没有任何文字记录，考古证据仍表明，当时已经形成了重量和数量两方面的度量概念。

structure.text: In spite of the absence of any written records
that concepts of measurements, both of weight and number, had been formulated

difficult_points: In spite of 后接名词短语，表达让步关系，不同于 although 后接完整从句。
that 从句作 reveals 的宾语；had been formulated 是过去完成时被动。
both of weight and number 插入说明 measurements 包括重量和数量两类。

expressions.text: in spite of the absence of

sentences.sentence: Standard measures may already have been in operation, such as those evidenced by a graduated series of lead weights - made in disc form -found at the site.
sentences.translation: 标准计量单位当时可能已经投入使用，例如遗址中发现的一组呈渐进规格、制成圆盘形的铅砝码所证明的那些单位。

structure.text: such as those evidenced by a graduated series of lead weights - made in disc form -found at the site
evidenced by a graduated series of lead weights

difficult_points: may have been 表示对过去已经使用标准单位的推测；in operation 意为投入使用。
those 代替 Standard measures，后接 evidenced by... 说明证据。
源文在第二个破折号与 found 之间缺少空格（`-found`），解析保留异常；made 和 found 均修饰 lead weights。

sentences.sentence: The existence of units of capacity in Late Bronze Age times is also evidenced by the notation of units of a liquid measure for wine on excavated containers.
sentences.translation: 青铜时代晚期容量单位的存在，也可由出土容器上标注的葡萄酒液体计量单位得到证明。

structure.text: The existence of units of capacity in Late Bronze Age times
by the notation of units of a liquid measure for wine on excavated containers

difficult_points: is evidenced by 是被动结构，表示容量单位的存在由何种证据证明。
on excavated containers 修饰 notation，说明计量符号出现的位置；excavated 修饰 containers。

sentences.sentence: It must be recognised that the function of pottery vessels plays a very important role in determining their characteristics.
sentences.translation: 必须认识到，陶器的功能在决定其特征方面起着非常重要的作用。

structure.text: that the function of pottery vessels plays a very important role in determining their characteristics

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语；must be recognised 表示作者强调必须接受这一认识。
play a role in 后接动名词 determining；their 指 pottery vessels。

sentences.sentence: The intended function affects the choice of clay, the production technique, and the shape and the size of the pots.
sentences.translation: 预定用途会影响黏土的选择、制作技术以及陶器的形状和尺寸。

structure.text: the choice of clay, the production technique, and the shape and the size of the pots

difficult_points: intended 是过去分词形容词，表示器物预先设定的用途。
affects 后列出三组并列对象，最后一组内部又由 shape 和 size 并列。

sentences.sentence: For example, large storage jars(pithoi) would be needed to store commodities, whereas smaller containers would be used for transport.
sentences.translation: 例如，储存货物需要大型储藏罐（pithoi），而运输则会使用较小的容器。

structure.text: whereas smaller containers would be used for transport

difficult_points: would be needed 与 would be used 都是对古代用途的推断性被动表达。
whereas 对比大型储藏罐与小型运输容器的不同功能。
源文 jars 与括号间缺少空格（`jars(pithoi)`），已原样保留。

sentences.sentence: In fact, the length of a man's arm limits the size of a smaller pot to a capacity of about twenty litres; that is also the maximum a man can comfortably carry.
sentences.translation: 事实上，人的手臂长度使小型陶罐的容量上限约为20升；这也正是一个人能够舒适搬运的最大容量。

structure.text: the length of a man's arm
the size of a smaller pot
to a capacity of about twenty litres
that is also the maximum a man can comfortably carry

difficult_points: limit A to B 表示把陶罐尺寸限制在约20升容量以内。
分号后的 that 指 about twenty litres；maximum 后省略关系词 that，a man can carry 修饰 maximum。

sentences.sentence: The various sizes of container would thus represent standard quantities of a commodity, which is a fundamental element in the function of exchange.
sentences.translation: 因此，不同尺寸的容器会代表某种商品的标准数量，而标准数量是交换功能中的基本要素。

structure.text: which is a fundamental element in the function of exchange

difficult_points: would 表示根据考古推断出的用途；thus 承接上一段功能决定容量的论证。
which 最自然地回指 standard quantities 这一概念，说明标准数量对交换至关重要。

sentences.sentence: Akrotirian merchants handling a commodity such as wine would have been able to determine easily the amount of wine they were transporting from the number of containers they carried in their ships, since the capacity of each container was known to be 14-18 litres.
sentences.translation: 阿克罗蒂里商人运输葡萄酒等商品时，可以根据船上所载容器的数量轻易确定运输的葡萄酒总量，因为每个容器的容量已知为14至18升。

structure.text: handling a commodity such as wine
would have been able to determine easily
the amount of wine they were transporting
from the number of containers they carried in their ships
since the capacity of each container was known to be 14-18 litres

difficult_points: handling... 修饰 merchants；would have been able to 是对古代商人能力的推测。
wine 后省略关系词 that，they were transporting 修饰 wine；containers 后也省略 that。
from 引出判断总量的依据；since 从句说明每个容器容量已知这一前提。

sentences.sentence: (We could draw a parallel here with the current practice in Greece of selling oil in 17 kilogram tins)
sentences.translation: （我们可以把这种做法与今天希腊用17公斤装罐出售食用油的惯例作比较。）

structure.text: here with the current practice in Greece
of selling oil in 17 kilogram tins

difficult_points: 整句括号内容是作者插入的现代类比，不属于主要考古论证。
draw a parallel with 表示把两种做法进行类比；of selling... 说明 current practice 的内容。

sentences.sentence: We may therefore assume that the shape, capacity, and, sometimes decoration of vessels are indicative of the commodity contained by them.
sentences.translation: 因此，我们可以推断，器皿的形状、容量，有时还有装饰，都能表明其中所装的商品。

structure.text: that the shape, capacity, and, sometimes decoration of vessels are indicative of the commodity contained by them

difficult_points: that 从句作 assume 的宾语，主语由 shape、capacity 和 decoration 并列组成。
sometimes 插入限定 decoration，表示装饰并非总能作为指标。
contained by them 修饰 commodity，them 指 vessels。

sentences.sentence: Since individual transactions would normally involve different quantities of a given commodity, a range of 'standardised' types of vessel would be needed to meet traders' requirements.
sentences.translation: 由于单笔交易通常涉及某种商品的不同数量，因此需要一系列“标准化”器皿类型来满足商人的需求。

structure.text: Since individual transactions would normally involve different quantities of a given commodity
a range of 'standardised' types of vessel

difficult_points: Since 引导原因从句；would 用于推测古代交易的一般情形。
would be needed 是推测性被动；to meet... 表示需要多种标准容器的目的。

sentences.sentence: In trying to reconstruct systems of capacity by measuring the volume of excavated pottery, a rather generous range of tolerances must be allowed.
sentences.translation: 通过测量出土陶器容积来重建容量体系时，必须允许相当宽的误差范围。

structure.text: In trying to reconstruct systems of capacity by measuring the volume of excavated pottery
by measuring the volume of excavated pottery
a rather generous range of tolerances

difficult_points: In trying... 表示研究者进行重建时的情境；by measuring... 说明重建方法。
must be allowed 是情态动词加被动语态；generous range 不是“慷慨”，而是容许范围较宽。

sentences.sentence: It seems possible that the potters of that time had specific sizes of vessel in mind, and tried to reproduce them using a specific type and amount of clay.
sentences.translation: 当时的陶工似乎可能心中已有特定的器皿尺寸，并尝试用特定种类和数量的黏土将其复制出来。

structure.text: that the potters of that time had specific sizes of vessel in mind, and tried to reproduce them using a specific type and amount of clay
using a specific type and amount of clay

difficult_points: It 是形式主语，that 从句是真正主语；seems possible 双重弱化结论，表明只是推测。
had 和 tried 是陶工的并列谓语；them 指 specific sizes of vessel。
using... 是方式状语，说明复制标准尺寸所用材料。

expressions.text: have a specific size in mind

sentences.sentence: However, it would be quite difficult for them to achieve the exact size required every time, without any mechanical means of regulating symmetry and wall thickness, and some potters would be more skilled than others.
sentences.translation: 然而，在没有机械手段控制对称性和器壁厚度的情况下，他们很难每次都达到所要求的精确尺寸，而且有些陶工的技艺会高于另一些人。

structure.text: for them to achieve the exact size required every time
without any mechanical means of regulating symmetry and wall thickness
and some potters would be more skilled than others

difficult_points: it 是形式主语，for them to achieve... 是真正主语，them 指古代陶工。
required every time 修饰 exact size；without... 说明无法稳定控制尺寸的技术限制。
and 后补充另一变异来源，即陶工技能存在差异；others 代替 other potters。

sentences.sentence: In addition, variations in the repetition of types and size may also occur because of unforeseen circumstances during the throwing process.
sentences.translation: 此外，在重复制作相同器型和尺寸时，也可能因拉坯过程中的意外情况而出现差异。

structure.text: variations in the repetition of types and size
because of unforeseen circumstances during the throwing process

difficult_points: variations 是主语，in the repetition... 说明差异出现在哪一环节。
throwing process 在制陶语境中指拉坯成形过程，不是“投掷”。
because of 后接名词短语，说明意外差异的原因。

sentences.sentence: For instance, instead of destroying the entire pot if the clay in the rim contained a piece of grit, a potter might produce a smaller pot by simply cutting off the rim.
sentences.translation: 例如，如果罐口黏土中夹有一粒砂石，陶工可能不会毁掉整只陶罐，而是直接切掉罐口，做成一个较小的罐子。

structure.text: instead of destroying the entire pot
if the clay in the rim contained a piece of grit
by simply cutting off the rim

difficult_points: instead of 后接动名词 destroying，与主句 produce a smaller pot 构成做法对比。
if 从句说明陶工遇到的具体意外；might 表示可能采取的处理方式。
by cutting off... 说明做出较小陶罐的方法。

sentences.sentence: Even where there is no noticeable external difference between pots meant to contain the same quantity of a commodity, differences in their capacity can actually reach one or two litres.
sentences.translation: 即使原本用于盛装同等数量商品的陶罐在外观上没有明显差异，其实际容量差异也可能达到一至两升。

structure.text: Even where there is no noticeable external difference between pots meant to contain the same quantity of a commodity
meant to contain the same quantity of a commodity

difficult_points: Even where 引导让步情境，表示即便外观难以区分，容量仍可能不同。
meant to contain... 修饰 pots，说明这些容器的预定标准用途。
their 指 pots；reach 在此为及物动词，表示差异达到某个数值。

sentences.sentence: In one case the deviation from the required size appears to be as much as 10-20 percent.
sentences.translation: 在一个案例中，实际尺寸与要求尺寸的偏差似乎高达10%至20%。

structure.text: the deviation from the required size

difficult_points: deviation from 表示实际容量偏离目标尺寸的程度。
appears to 表示基于测量的谨慎判断；as much as 强调偏差幅度很大。

sentences.sentence: The establishment of regular trade routes within the Aegean led to increased movement of goods; consequently a regular exchange of local, luxury and surplus goods, including metals, would have become feasible as a result of the advances in transport technology.
sentences.translation: 爱琴海地区固定贸易路线的建立促进了货物流动；因此，随着运输技术进步，包括金属在内的本地商品、奢侈品和剩余商品得以进行常态化交换。

structure.text: The establishment of regular trade routes within the Aegean
consequently a regular exchange of local, luxury and surplus goods, including metals, would have become feasible
as a result of the advances in transport technology

difficult_points: 分号连接贸易路线带来流动和商品交换变得可行两个因果相连的分句。
would have become 是对古代结果的推测；including metals 插入补充商品例子。
as a result of 说明常态交换得以实现的技术条件。

expressions.text: lead to increased movement of goods
as a result of advances in

sentences.sentence: The increased demand for standardised exchanges, inextricably linked to commercial transactions, might have been one of the main factors which led to the standardisation of pottery production.
sentences.translation: 对标准化交换日益增长的需求与商业交易密不可分，可能正是推动陶器生产标准化的主要因素之一。

structure.text: The increased demand for standardised exchanges
which led to the standardisation of pottery production

difficult_points: inextricably linked... 是过去分词短语，修饰 demand，说明标准交换需求与商业交易无法分开。
might have been 表示对过去原因的谨慎推测。
which 修饰 factors，说明这些因素带来的标准化结果。

sentences.sentence: Thus, the whole network of ceramic production and exchange would have depended on specific regional economic conditions, and would reflect the socio-economic structure of prehistoric Akrotiri.
sentences.translation: 因此，整个陶器生产与交换网络可能依赖特定的区域经济条件，并反映史前阿克罗蒂里的社会经济结构。

structure.text: the whole network of ceramic production and exchange
would have depended on specific regional economic conditions
and would reflect the socio-economic structure of prehistoric Akrotiri

difficult_points: would have depended on 推测古代网络过去的依赖关系，would reflect 则说明该网络可作为社会结构的反映。
两个谓语由 and 连接，共用主语 the whole network。
Thus 表明这一结论综合了前文贸易、标准容量与生产组织的论证。
